mapper.select: SELECT sys12_calendar.*, sys01_company_nm AS sys12_company_nm FROM sys12_calendar INNER JOIN sys01_company ON sys01_company_id = sys12_company_id WHERE sys12_calendar_id = #{calendarId}

SELECT sys12_calendar.*, sys01_company_nm AS sys12_company_nm FROM sys12_calendar INNER JOIN sys01_company ON sys01_company_id = sys12_company_id WHERE sys12_day = #{stdDate}::timestamp AND sys12_company_id = #{companyId} LIMIT 1

SELECT sys12_calendar.*, sys01_company_nm AS sys12_company_nm FROM sys12_calendar INNER JOIN sys01_company ON sys01_company_id = sys12_company_id WHERE sys12_day = #{stdDate}::timestamp AND (#{companyId} IS NULL OR sys12_company_id = #{companyId}::bigint) AND sys01_use_yn = 'true' ORDER BY sys01_company_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys12_calendar SELECT f_create_seq() , #{companyId} , dt , CASE TO_CHAR(dt, 'D') WHEN '1' THEN '일요일' WHEN '2' THEN '월요일' WHEN '3' THEN '화요일' WHEN '4' THEN '수요일' WHEN '5' THEN '목요일' WHEN '6' THEN '금요일' WHEN '7' THEN '토요일' END AS yoil , CASE TO_CHAR(dt, 'D') WHEN '1' THEN 'false' WHEN '7' THEN 'false' ELSE (CASE WHEN sys14_holiday_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END) END AS working_yn , sys14_holiday_nm AS sys12_off_reason , '' FROM (SELECT generate_series(TO_DATE(#{startYmd}, 'yyyymmdd'), TO_DATE(#{endYmd}, 'yyyymmdd'), '1 day'::interval)::date AS dt) a LEFT OUTER JOIN sys14_holiday ON (sys14_company_id = #{companyId} AND sys14_day = dt)
